title: Work-order condition unsatisfied state
definition: The visible existing-condition state selected when the native cached next-check result is false.

facts.statement: A false cached result renders the annotation Not satisfied for next check in bright native red foreground index 4 on black background index 0.
The unsatisfied attributes apply to the next-check annotation, not the row's operator, quantity, or item-description fragments.

positive: A false cached result displays the exact unsatisfied annotation and all three color attributes.
boundary: Only the annotation span is bright red; adjacent condition fragments retain their own attributes.
counterexamples: The same row with a true cached result uses the satisfied state instead.

absenceGuards: Do not color the operator, quantity, or item-description fragments bright red as part of this state.

requiredFrames: Existing row with a false cached result and the complete next-check annotation span
